reference: I have an itching feeling inside my chest, under my left chest muscle. Additionally, I keep passing out and vomiting at the gym. The itchy feeling usually occurs after running. I also keep feeling my heart beating very hard, even though the running machine says my beats per minute are going down. I am very confused.
